# CWE-349 vulnerable: Acceptance of Extraneous Untrusted Data With Trusted Data (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-349-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type SignedEnvelope struct {
	TrustedChannel bool            `json:"trusted_channel"`
	Profile        json.RawMessage `json:"profile"`
}

func ProcessSignedEnvelope(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	var env SignedEnvelope
	_ = json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&env)
	var profile map[string]interface{}
	_ = json.Unmarshal(env.Profile, &profile)
	if env.TrustedChannel {
		_, err := db.Exec("UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE id = ?", profile["role"], profile["id"])
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return err
		}
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	return nil
}
